inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the wall where wainscoting will be installed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the wall where wainscoting will be installed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lambri montajı yapılacak duvarın toplam uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Wainscoting Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the wainscoting paneling from floor to top rail.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the wainscoting paneling from floor to top rail.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lambri panelinin zeminden üst rayına kadar olan yüksekliği.

inputs.label: Panel Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of each individual wainscoting panel (excluding stiles).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of each individual wainscoting panel (excluding stiles).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir lambri panelinin genişliği (dikmeler hariç).

inputs.label: Stile Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the vertical trim pieces separating panels (includes end stiles).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the vertical trim pieces separating panels (includes end stiles).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Panelleri ayıran dikey trim parçalarının genişliği (uç dikmeler dahil).

inputs.label: Plywood Sheet Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a standard plywood sheet (typically 8 ft).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a standard plywood sheet (typically 8 ft).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart bir kontrplak levhanın uzunluğu (genellikle 8 ft).

inputs.label: Plywood Sheet Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of a standard plywood sheet (typically 4 ft).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of a standard plywood sheet (typically 4 ft).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart bir kontrplak levhanın genişliği (genellikle 4 ft).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
